instrumental_clean.name: Instrumental Clean
instrumental_clean.description: Cleanest instrumentals with minimal vocal bleed — Fv7z (bleedless 44.61) + Resurrection Inst (SDR 17.25)

instrumental_full.name: Instrumental Full
instrumental_full.description: Maximum instrument preservation — v1e+ (fullness 37.89) + becruily inst (SOTA SDR 17.55)

instrumental_balanced.name: Instrumental Balanced
instrumental_balanced.description: Good balance of noise and fullness — Gabox INSTV8 + Resurrection Inst

instrumental_low_resource.name: Instrumental Low Resource
instrumental_low_resource.description: Fast ensemble for low VRAM — Resurrection Inst (200MB) + MDX HQ_5 (ONNX, very fast)

vocal_balanced.name: Vocal Balanced
vocal_balanced.description: Best overall vocal quality — Resurrection (SDR 11.34) + Beta 6X (SDR 11.12) averaged

vocal_clean.name: Vocal Clean
vocal_clean.description: Minimal instrument bleed in vocals — Revive 2 (bleedless 40.07) + FT2 bleedless (39.30) with min FFT

vocal_full.name: Vocal Full
vocal_full.description: Maximum vocal capture including harmonies — Revive 3e (fullness 21.43) + becruily vocal with max FFT

vocal_rvc.name: Vocal RVC
vocal_rvc.description: Optimized for RVC/AI voice training data — Beta 6X + Gabox voc_fv4 averaged

karaoke.name: Karaoke
karaoke.description: Lead vocal removal — 3-model karaoke ensemble reaches SDR ~10.6 vs ~10.2 single model
